final.design_basis: SAB-inspired square-grid ancients engine with facing-led movement, line-and-column groups, scaled attrition, structured combat details, march actions, screening fire, flee/pursuit, residual contact cleanup, lane-based frontage pairing, terrain-aware combat, interpenetration, and broader scenario support
